tools.name: catalog_get
tools.description: Get the compact definition and type-specific metadata for one exact catalog ref. A dashboard/page location is required when a visual or filter is shared.

tools.name: catalog_list
tools.description: Browse one deterministic level of the authorized LeapView catalog hierarchy. Omit parent to list workspaces, then pass returned refs to continue browsing.

tools.name: catalog_search
tools.description: Search the complete authorized LeapView BI catalog across workspaces. Use this when you know words from a resource name or description but not its exact location.

tools.name: docs_read
tools.description: Read a bounded line window from one LeapView document returned by docs_search. Continue with nextOffset when truncated is true.

id.description: Stable doc:<path> ID returned by docs_search.

offset.description: First line to read, starting at 1; defaults to 1.

limit.description: Maximum lines to read; defaults to 200 and is also byte-bounded.

tools.name: docs_search
tools.description: Search LeapView's version-matched product documentation. Returns ranked, bounded matches with stable document IDs and excerpts. Continue with nextCursor when hasMore is true, or use the optional path prefix to narrow broad searches.

query.description: Words or phrases to find in LeapView documentation.

path.description: Optional documentation path prefix, such as guides/build, api, cli, or visuals.

cursor.description: Opaque nextCursor from a previous call with the same query and path.

limit.description: Maximum matches to return; defaults to 8.

tools.name: query_dashboard_visual
tools.description: Query an existing dashboard visual with governed filters and compact analytical output

lastSuccessfulRefreshAt.description: Completion time of the last successful publish or refresh. This is not an upstream event-time watermark.

servingStateId.description: Serving state that produced the successful data version.

snapshotId.description: DuckLake snapshot ID recorded for the successful data version.

source.description: Whether the data version came from publish or refresh.

status.description: current when the successful data version belongs to the queried serving snapshot; stale otherwise.

tools.name: query_semantic_model
tools.description: Query governed semantic data with typed columns, filters, pagination, and provenance

field.description: Semantic field or measure ID. Use the ID returned by catalog_list or catalog_get.

fact.description: Fact table used to resolve a conformed dimension when it is otherwise ambiguous.

field.description: Semantic field ID. Omit only when groups supplies nested filters.

filters.description: Filters combined within this nested group.

operator.description: Governed comparison operator. equals is used when omitted.

values.description: Comparison values. is_null and is_not_null accept no values.

field.description: Semantic field or measure ID. Use the ID returned by catalog_list or catalog_get.

direction.description: Sort direction. Defaults to ascending when omitted.

field.description: Selected output field or alias to sort.

grain.description: Calendar grain used to group the time field.

tools.name: query_visual
tools.description: Create one read-only visual from LeapView semantic model fields. Data is queried from semantic models; do not provide inline data.

rows.description: Row fields for matrix-style table output.

series.description: Optional series field for split charts.

sort.description: Sort fields applied to the query result.
